title: Project Manager ( Shipping )
description:
Designation: Project Manger

JOB ROLE:

1. Business Development and Sales Visit to potential project clients on daily basis in Singapore especially local freight forwarders, local EPC Contractors (Oil & Gas, Energy, Construction, Heavy Engineering etc.)

2. Business Development with Overseas Project Agents in Project Networks where CEEKAY is member.

3. Leading and coordinating the project team

4. Sales support for project clients at project RFQ stage

5. Project Study & Survey with Technical and Commercial Proposal to customer

6. Responsible for Project Cargo pricing independently for ODC, RORO & Breakbulk cargoes.

7. Good Relationship with local vendors including carriers, transporters, other service providers who are crucial for project execution with timelines promised to customer.

8. Leading and coordinating the project team.

9. Project Planning, Supervision and Monitoring for maintaining KPIs .

10. Provide Value Added Services if required for Project Execution.

  1. Acts as primary liaison between customer, project staff, subcontractors, vendors and internal company personnel.
  2. Ensures company performance against contractual commitments with customer and ensures customer satisfaction with projects of low to moderate complexity and risk.

13. Project Management- End to End basis (Door to Door).

14. Timely Project Reporting to client along with project team.

15. Budgeting of Project Department and Business Forecast for each financial year.

16. Managing Risk & Issues to Ensure the project meets its objectives and deliverables.

17. Work under challenging and multitasking environment

postedCompany.description:
CEEKAY LINE, the NVOCC arm of PAREKH GROUP started operation in the year 2002 to provide multimodal transport services between Indian Sub- Continent and Middle East

The Company over the years has expanded its service profile with a strong presence in 30+ countries and 50+ ports making it one of the most trusted and reputed NVOCC operator in the Indian Sub-Continent, Middle East Gulf, Far East, Europe Base port, East Africa & South East Asia region with a fleet of 6000 + containers

To cater the growing demand from the market and its customers, CEEKAY LINE ventured into the special equipment and projects business by incorporating a brand new fleet of special equipment to handle oversized, odd dimensionl and project cargos.

With a strong team of experinced professionals and sound product knowledge, CEEKAY LINE today is the preferred carrier of choice for dry, refrigerated and odd dimensional cargos with an unmatched feel mix which makes it stand out in the industry.
postedCompany.name: CEEKAY SHIPPING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
